DEN Airport Screen Networks

Clear Channel Airports inventory inside Denver International, grouped by concourse and built for the airline sponsor conversation.

Screens
5
Airport areas

How the rates work (per Clear Channel / Alex Sanchez): one to two week campaigns run at 75% of the negotiated rate, three to four week campaigns at 100%. Special events with minimum buys are excluded from the 75%, so confirm the weekend isn't treated as one. Rates shown lead with the one-week figure since the activation falls in that window.

Flags: the Concourse B 120-screen banner network shows a one-week rate that reads as a typo in the grid ($6,150); the figure here is the correct 75% value ($67,725), pending Alex's confirmation. Photos are representative stock from each network and not the specific screens contracted.
